019441.source_note: 用户 2026-06-22 反馈的支付宝/代销交易页当前限额
019441.channel_note: 覆盖东方财富移动接口仍显示的单日投资上限10000元；代销/实际交易入口优先。

execution_monitor.alert_policy: Compare current refresh against the previous snapshot; keep unchanged alerts for a short window so opened pages can still show recent buyability or limit moves. Subscription status and limits remain execution information and do not affect tier scores.

scoring_model.method: return-priority model for the current A-share watchlist; return metrics carry 55%, tracking error and base fee carry 35%, fund size carries 6%, transaction frictions carry 4%; subscription status and purchase limits are execution filters only and do not affect tier scores; lower-is-better metrics are reverse normalized; fund size uses log10 before normalization
scoring_model.tier_method: S/A/B/C/D relative percentile buckets within the current watchlist

rules.label: 近3年收益
rules.method: 东方财富 SYL_3Y，同池归一化
rules.reason: 核心目标是长期收益优先；机构和指数基金社区通常会先看长期业绩是否稳定跟上标的。

rules.label: 近1年收益
rules.method: 东方财富 SYL_1N，同池归一化
rules.reason: 保留近端表现，避免只看长期旧数据；权重低于 3 年收益，防止追短期热点。

rules.label: 跟踪误差
rules.method: 天天基金特色数据页，反向归一化
rules.reason: iShares、State Street 和 Bogleheads 都把跟踪质量视为指数基金核心指标；误差越小越稳定。

rules.label: 管理+托管
rules.method: 管理费率 + 托管费率，反向归一化
rules.reason: Vanguard 等机构长期强调低费率会改善投资者净回报；管理费和托管费是长期持有的持续拖累。

rules.label: 基金规模
rules.method: 东方财富 ENDNAV 转亿元，取 log10 后归一化
rules.reason: 规模只作稳定性和流动性辅助项；它不替代收益、跟踪质量和费用。

rules.label: 买入费率
rules.reason: 一次性交易成本会影响定投入场，但长期影响弱于持续费用和跟踪质量。

rules.label: 赎回灵活性
rules.method: 达到 0% 赎回费所需天数，反向归一化
rules.reason: 赎回灵活性是辅助条件，不应压过收益、跟踪误差和持续费用。

auto_invest_plan.status_policy: 本项目不再记录个人定投金额、持仓金额、收益或按业务日推算账本；只保留定投中、暂停定投、候选三类状态标签。具体金额、成交和收益以支付宝或基金公司交易页为准。

status_summary.source: user request 2026-06-29; prior Alipay screenshots 2026-06-22 23:22/23:23 plus user update 2026-06-23 for status only
status_summary.note: User decided on 2026-06-29 to stop maintaining personal amount and holding ledger data in this project. Keep only status tags; read exact amounts, execution, holdings, and returns from Alipay.

tracking_plan.refresh_policy: GitHub Actions refreshes the main data three times per Beijing day; portfolio_tracking.json upserts today's record and appends only when the Beijing date changes.
tracking_plan.status_policy: 本项目不再记录个人定投金额、持仓金额、收益或按业务日推算账本；只保留定投中、暂停定投、候选三类状态标签。具体金额、成交和收益以支付宝或基金公司交易页为准。
tracking_plan.note: Long-term records now track only auto-invest status tags. Personal amounts, holdings, transactions, and returns are intentionally not stored.
